summary: Frontend refactoring Phase 2 testing completed. All 7 extracted page components (FunnelPage, LeadDiscoveryPage, CampaignsPage, AgentsPage, CallHistoryPage, SettingsPage, CreditPacksPage) and supporting components (Sidebar, StatusBadge, BookingDialog) are working correctly. App.js reduced from 5,800 to 371 lines. Navigation and page rendering all pass.

eslint_warnings.issue: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchAgents'
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'fetchCalls'
React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'checkPaymentStatus'

critical_code_review_comments: App.js: Successfully reduced from ~5,800 lines to 371 lines. All page components properly imported and routed.
FunnelPage.jsx: Correctly displays all 4 funnel stages with lead cards and action buttons. Uses data-testid attributes.
LeadDiscoveryPage.jsx: Shows leads table with AI Discovery and Upload CSV tabs. Intent keywords section working.
CampaignsPage.jsx: Campaign cards with status badges, follow-up settings, and A/B testing options.
AgentsPage.jsx: Agent cards with voice settings, Clone Voice button, and use case templates.
CallHistoryPage.jsx: Call records table with recording playback and transcript features.
SettingsPage.jsx: Integration status cards, Caller ID rotation, team management, and qualification criteria.
CreditPacksPage.jsx: Subscription plans, lead packs, call packs, and top-ups with Stripe checkout integration.
Sidebar.jsx: Responsive design with mobile/desktop variants. All nav items have data-testid attributes.
StatusBadge.jsx: Renders correct status labels and colors for all statuses.
BookingDialog.jsx: Opens correctly with agent selection dropdown and notes field.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend refactoring Phase 2 complete. All extracted components verified working: FunnelPage.jsx, LeadDiscoveryPage.jsx, CampaignsPage.jsx, AgentsPage.jsx, CallHistoryPage.jsx, SettingsPage.jsx, CreditPacksPage.jsx, Sidebar.jsx, StatusBadge.jsx, BookingDialog.jsx. App.js imports all components correctly. Minor ESLint warnings for useEffect dependencies but no functional issues.

tests: All 4 funnel stages displayed (New Leads, Contacted, Qualified, Booked)
Lead cards show business name, phone, and action buttons
Stats bar shows Total Leads, Qualification Rate, Booking Rate, Total Calls
AI Discovery and Upload CSV tabs present
Intent Keywords section with keyword chips
Discovered Leads table with status badges
Total Calls and Qualified stats displayed
Agent cards with voice settings indicator
Voice preview and settings buttons present
Call records table with columns (Call ID, Status, Duration, Recording, Qualification, Date, Actions)
Integration Status section with 5 integrations (Twilio, Twitter/X, Email, Calendly, Apollo.io)
Caller ID Rotation section with Number Pool
Rotation Mode options (Round Robin, Random, Geographic)
Current Balance card with Lead Credits and Call Credits
Tabs: Subscriptions, Lead Packs, Call Packs, Top-ups
Subscription plan cards with pricing and features
All nav items present (Getting Started, Funnel, Usage, Lead Discovery, Campaigns, Agents, Bookings, Call History, Analytics, CRM Integrations, Compliance, Credit Packs, Settings)
User info and credits displayed correctly
Renders correct labels for all statuses
Correct color coding for each status
Component imported correctly in FunnelPage and LeadDiscoveryPage
